aboutPage.description.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.
aboutPage.description.zh: {brand} 是一个免费、注重隐私的 PDF 工具包，完全在您的浏览器中运行。拥有 {count}+ 个专业工具，您可以编辑、转换、合并、分割和保护您的 PDF 文件，而无需将其上传到任何服务器。

aboutPage.mission.p1.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
aboutPage.mission.p1.zh: 我们相信，每个人都应该能够使用强大的 PDF 工具，而无需牺牲隐私或支付昂贵的订阅费用。这就是为什么我们创建了 {brand} —— 一个将您的隐私放在首位的综合 PDF 工具包。

aboutPage.mission.p2.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
aboutPage.mission.p2.zh: 与要求您将文件上传到远程服务器的传统 PDF 服务不同，{brand} 在您的浏览器中本地处理所有内容。您的敏感文档从未离开您的设备，让您完全控制您的数据。

aboutPage.mission.p3.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
aboutPage.mission.p3.zh: 无论您是学生、专业人士还是普通用户，{brand} 都为您提供高效、安全地处理 PDF 所需的所有工具。

aboutPage.values.privacy.description.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
aboutPage.values.privacy.description.zh: 您的文件从未离开您的设备。所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，确保完全的隐私和安全。

aboutPage.values.fast.description.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
aboutPage.values.fast.description.zh: 由现代 Web 技术驱动，PDFCraft 提供闪电般的 PDF 处理速度，无需上传或下载。

aboutPage.values.accessible.description.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
aboutPage.values.accessible.description.zh: 提供 9 种语言版本，可在任何带有现代浏览器的设备上工作。无需安装。

aboutPage.values.free.description.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
aboutPage.values.free.description.zh: PDFCraft 完全免费使用，没有隐藏费用，无需注册，也不限制使用次数。

aboutPage.values.openSource.description.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
aboutPage.values.openSource.description.zh: 以透明为核心构建。我们的代码是开源的，允许任何人验证我们的隐私承诺。

aboutPage.values.community.description.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
aboutPage.values.community.description.zh: 根据全球用户的反馈开发。我们会根据您的需求不断改进。

aboutPage.technology.description.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
aboutPage.technology.description.zh: {brand} 采用尖端 Web 技术构建，以确保最佳体验：

aboutPage.technology.list.nextjs.zh: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - 用于快速、SEO友好的页面渲染

aboutPage.technology.list.wasm.zh: <strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - 提供近乎原生的 PDF 处理性能

aboutPage.technology.list.workers.zh: <strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - 用于非阻塞后台处理

aboutPage.technology.list.pdflib.zh: <strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - 业界标准的 PDF 操作库

aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.zh: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - 用于安全地本地存储您的工作

aboutPage.technology.summary.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
aboutPage.technology.summary.zh: 这种技术组合使我们能够提供专业级的 PDF 工具，完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需任何服务器端处理。

aboutPage.cta.description.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
aboutPage.cta.description.zh: 探索我们的 {count}+ 个 PDF 工具，看看 {brand} 能为您做什么。
